name: Impossible Quesadilla Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Grease a 10-inch pie plate.
3. Sprinkle the chili mixture and shredded cheese evenly over the bottom of the plate.
4. In a blender, beat remaining ingredients for about 15 seconds, or mix with a hand beater for 1 minute until smooth.
5. Pour the batter into the pie plate.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for about 25-30 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow to cool for 10 minutes before serving with sour cream and quacamole.
